case_title: MENDEZ, CANDIDO ORTEGA vs. CALDERON, IRMA AN IND/DBA JANITORIAL MAINTENANCE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, CANDIDO ORTEGA AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, IRMA AN IND/DBA JANITORIAL MAINTENANCE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, IRMA AN IND/DBA JANITORIAL MAINTENANCE $1,690.50 PRINCIPAL, $9.33 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,793.83
